{{Infobox character
| name = Trainer Mura
| introduced = cradle-13-threshold
| name = Trainer Mura
| aliases = Mura
| appears_in = Cradle
| titles = Trainer
| abilities = Presence
| introduced = cradle-13-threshold
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Trainer Mura is an instructor responsible for guiding trainees, such as [[Orthos]], through their development. Her role involves teaching students how to connect their physical movements to the [[Way]] and helping them internalize the guidance of the [[Presence]]. In addition to practical training, she provides instruction on the history of the [[Wolf Division]] and general knowledge regarding the [[Abidan]]. Mura also manages daily routines, including meal schedules and training sessions. Beyond her instructional duties, she has been observed performing rescue work by clearing debris to assist injured individuals.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Trainer Mura is a tall, powerful woman distinguished by her dark purple hair. As a trainer who utilizes [[Presence]] to guide her students, she works to rescue individuals from wreckage. While she can fold possibilities into existence to create temporary copies of herself, only her original body requires sustenance.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Trainer Mura]] is a tall and powerful woman with dark purple hair.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c10">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Trainer Mura]]'s copies are temporary entities folded into existence from possibilities.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Trainer Mura]]'s original body is the only one that needs to eat.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Trainer Mura]] is a trainer who uses [[Presence]] to guide students.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Mura is a Trainer.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Trainer Mura]] is rescuing people from wreckage.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c10" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
